body.text: Here is what I can do for you:

facts.title: 📋 Digest
facts.value: Type 'digest' or 'update' to see your daily opportunities.

facts.title: 📅 Events
facts.value: Type 'events' to see upcoming hackathons and talks.

facts.title: 📧 Inbox
facts.value: Type 'inbox' to review your archived emails.

facts.title: 👤 View Profile
facts.value: Type 'show my profile' or 'my settings' to see your current preferences.

facts.title: ✏️ Update Profile
facts.value: Type 'change my [field] to [value]' (e.g., 'change faculty to Arts').
